# CWE-619: Dangling Database Cursor ('Cursor Injection')
lang: go
file: CWE-619-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Vulnerable: sql.Rows is not closed when an early return occurs.
func ListOrders(c *gin.Context, db *sql.DB) {
	rows, err := db.Query("SELECT id, total FROM orders WHERE owner_id = $1", c.Query("owner"))
	if err != nil {
		c.Status(http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	if !rows.Next() {
		c.Status(http.StatusNotFound)
		return
	}
	var id int
	var total float64
	_ = rows.Scan(&id, &total)
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"id": id, "total": total})
}
